script.title: Habits That Last
script.description: Forming habits is key to achieving monthly goals, but most people go about it the wrong way. Here's why traditional habit formation methods fail and what you can do instead.
script.narration: Most people try to form habits by focusing on the end result. But that's backwards. You're not going to stick to a habit just because you want the outcome. You need to focus on the process. That's where monthly goals come in. By setting specific, achievable goals for each month, you can create a system that helps you build lasting habits. It's not about being perfect, it's about being consistent. So, what are the key habits to focus on? Setting clear goals, tracking progress, and creating accountability.

scenes.description: Someone writing down their monthly goals in a planner
A person tracking their progress on a fitness tracker or habit tracker
A group of people supporting each other in achieving their goals
